prose:
Frontier-orbital calculation on molecular oxygen (O₂, 2 atoms) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard') in PySCF. Gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 3 (triplet ground state, UKS). Geometry taken as-is from the user-supplied file (single-point, no relaxation at this level). Density fitting OFF (exact four-centre integrals). SCF converged in 7 cycles. No warnings reported (warnings array empty — clean run). Integrity status: ok, trustworthy: true.

Headline result — HOMO–LUMO gap: 5.2880586 eV
HOMO (index 15): −8.8739616 eV
LUMO (index 16): −3.5859031 eV

HOMO and HOMO−1 are degenerate at −8.8739616 eV, and LUMO and LUMO+1 are degenerate at −3.5859031 eV, consistent with the doubly degenerate π* SOMO/LUMO set expected for the D∞h O₂ triplet ground state.

Koopmans descriptors: vertical IP = 8.8739616 eV, vertical EA = 3.5859031 eV, electronegativity = 6.2299323 eV, chemical hardness = 2.6440293 eV, chemical softness = 0.37821064 eV⁻¹, electrophilicity index = 7.3395664 eV.

Total electronic energy: −150.38872 Eh (−4092.2855 eV).

CLI invocation:
python /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 3
